description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a geometric, angular design. The exterior features large blue-tinted glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. Multiple balconies and terraces with glass railings are present, along with a prominent chimney structure and several cantilevered sections. The building sits on a rectangular base platform, with visible steps and entryways leading to the main doors. The color palette is primarily white with accents of gray, teal, and brown, highlighting the minimalist and clean lines of the architecture. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, typical of modern urban residential buildings.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large blue-tinted windows, glass balconies, and a minimalist white and gray exterior.
description_view_0: This view shows the front facade with a prominent balcony, glass railings, and the main entryway beneath a cantilevered section.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the extensive use of glass, a large terrace, and the main entrance area with steps and a brown platform.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the rear side with a smaller balcony, glass doors, and the vertical chimney structure.
description_view_3: The opposite side displays a wide balcony, grouped windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
